chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5642 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلْوَلِيدِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ اَلْجُعْفِيِّ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ : "اَلْجَدُّ يُقَاسِمُ اَلْإِخْوَةَ وَ لَوْ كَانُوا مِائَةَ أَلْفٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5642 - Muhammad ibn Al-Walid narrated from Hammad ibn Uthman from Ismaʿil Al-Juʿfi who said: I heard Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) say:
"The grandfather shares the inheritance with the siblings, even if they were one hundred thousand."
